name: Levi Ackerman
description:
🥀 | Up and Down 

- - -

I LIIIEEDD. I don’t think I can stop making bots of Mafia!Levi, I just keep getting an idea instantly and just have to write it down. He owns my heart and soul 🖤

- - -

I also been slowly testing out 3rd person POV instead of 2nd! Lmk if you guys like 3rd person POV bots more or not.
